one_liner: Monday.com offers a broad, self-serve GraphQL API with token/OAuth authentication and an official hosted/local MCP server, making it readily buildable for AI agent toolkits.

auth_methods.notes: Personal API token from profile/Developers section, sent in Authorization header
OAuth access tokens with scoped permissions for apps/integrations
Short-lived tokens (5 min) for integration recipes and seamless SDK-based auth for view apps

self_serve_notes: Free developer accounts can be created solely for API/app development without a paid subscription. Free plan users get 1,000 API calls/day; developer accounts get high complexity-based rate limits (1,000,000 complexity points/min in playground). Personal API tokens are generated directly from account settings with no approval process needed.

api_surface.notes: Single GraphQL endpoint (api.monday.com/v2) covering boards, items, users, docs, files, webhooks, apps framework, etc.

evidence.supports: Token-based auth via Authorization header, personal API tokens, OAuth
Four auth methods: seamless SDK, short-lived tokens, OAuth, global API token
Self-serve developer account creation, GraphQL endpoint details
Free plan API limits and complexity-based rate limiting
